package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for domain_entity_contains_json_tags_without_boundary_exception: Core domain entities that are directly annotated for API serialization without a deliberate boundary exception.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule026NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule026NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule026NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario026Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule026NegativeService, input Rule026NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
